MACEDONIAN KINGDOM. Philip III Arrhidaeus (323-317 BC). AR drachm (18mm, 4.21 gm, 11h). NGC MS 4/5- 3/5, brushed. Lifetime issue, Magnesia ad Maeandrum, ca. 323-319 BC. Head of Heracles right
sales.description:
Ancients
MACEDONIAN KINGDOM. Philip III Arrhidaeus (323-317 BC). AR drachm (18mm, 4.21 gm, 11h). NGC MS 4/5- 3/5, brushed. Lifetime issue, Magnesia ad Maeandrum, ca. 323-319 BC. Head of Heracles right, wearing lion skin headdress, paws tied before neck / ΦΙΛΙΠΠΟΥ, Zeus seated left on backless throne, right leg drawn back, feet on stool, eagle in outstretched right hand, grounded scepter in left; filleted thyrsus in left field. Price P51.
